underlying_goal: Perform a formal Stage 3 application audit for the Vision Alignment Initiative and verify the recommended changes were implemented to spec
friction_detail: First verification agent confirmed changes existed but didn't cross-check against synthesis source files, requiring user to push back and request a more thorough verification
brief_summary: User wanted a formal Stage 3 audit completed and the implemented changes verified against spec; both were achieved after a follow-up prompt for deeper verification.
